CVE-2015-3202.title: fusermount in FUSE before 2.9.3-15 does not properly clear the en ...
CVE-2015-3202.description: fusermount in FUSE before 2.9.3-15 does not properly clear the environment before invoking (1) mount or (2) umount as root, which allows local users to write to arbitrary files via a crafted LIBMOUNT_MTAB environment variable that is used by mount's debugging feature.
